title: Comedy Circus Ka Naya Daur
desc: This season pairs a veteran and celeb with a new talent and celeb. Their teams compete, and eliminations are based on combined scores, delivering a fun mix of comedy and antics.

title: Bhabiji Ghar Par Hai 2.0
desc: Vibhuti is surprised when Prem and Anurag come to Ghunghatganj. Later, upon hearing a guest's screams, everyone arrives in time for him to claim that he saw a ghost.

title: Happu Ki Ultan Paltan
desc: Amma frequently spends her time talking with her associate Matadin. Meanwhile, Pinkesh formally requests Happu to apprehend Ranbir, as Beni takes an unconscious Amma to the medical facility.

title: Happu Ki Ultan Paltan
desc: As Rajesh worries to tell Amma about her favorite saree burning, Kamlesh tries to have it mended. At the same time, the commissioner assigns Happu to apprehend the burglar who took his chain.

title: Gharwali Pedwali
desc: Latika offers Jeetu her homemade laddus and asks him to uphold Saavi's honour. Meanwhile, Saavi reveals the truth to her family, Lattu pranks Jeetu again and Saavi's modern look shocks Geeta.
